channel.title: npj Quantum Materials
channel.description:
Open for Submissions

Publishing high-quality research on quantum materials and condensed matter.

npj Quantum Materials is a fully open-access journal that aims to publish work that significantly advances understanding of the fundamental properties, fabrication and applications of quantum materials.

npj Quantum Materials covers topics including, but not limited to, superconductivity and superconducting materials, correlated electronic physics and materials, topological quantum physics and materials, quantum phenomena in advanced energy materials, condensed matter, and the materials science of advanced quantum technologies.

In addition to original research, the journal welcomes critical Reviews, and thought-provoking Perspectives and Comment articles.
channel.dc:rights: © 2026 Macmillan Publishers Limited, part of Springer Nature. All rights reserved.
channel.prism:copyright: © 2026 Macmillan Publishers Limited, part of Springer Nature. All rights reserved.

item.title: [7] Failed superconductivity in a Mott spin liquid material
item.content:encoded:
Last authors: Martin Dressel, Dragana Popović

Authors: Yuxin Wang, Vladimir Dobrosavljević, Eun Sang Choi, et al.

Score 7/10 B_IMPORTANT_CONDMAT

Why: Study of strongly correlated electron systems and Mott physics relevant to broader CM interests.

Tags: #superconductivity #Mott #spinliquid

Abstract: npj Quantum Materials, Published online: 12 May 2026; doi:10.1038/s41535-026-00890-8 Failed superconductivity in a Mott spin liquid material
item.dc:title: [7] Failed superconductivity in a Mott spin liquid material

item.title: [10] Altermagnetism, kagome flat band, and Weyl fermion states in magnetically intercalated transition metal dichalcogenides
item.content:encoded:
Last authors: Pavlo Sukhachov, Guang Bian

Authors: Avinash Sah, Ting Yong Lim, Clayton Conner, et al.

Score 10/10 A_MUST_READ

Why: Direct overlap with kagome physics, Weyl semimetals, and altermagnetism in relevant material classes.

Tags: #kagome #altermagnetism #Weyl #electronicstructure

Abstract: npj Quantum Materials, Published online: 09 May 2026; doi:10.1038/s41535-026-00885-5 Altermagnetism, kagome flat band, and Weyl fermion states in magnetically intercalated transition metal dichalcogenides
item.dc:title: [10] Altermagnetism, kagome flat band, and Weyl fermion states in magnetically intercalated transition metal dichalcogenides
item.dc:creator: Last authors: Pavlo Sukhachov, Guang Bian; Authors: Avinash Sah, Ting Yong Lim, Clayton Conner, et al.
Ting Yong Lim
Clayton Conner
Amarnath Chakraborty
Giovanni Vignale
Tay-Rong Chang
Pavlo Sukhachov
Guang Bian

item.title: [8] Chiral charge density wave in 1T- and 4Hb-TaS2: the role of interlayer coupling
item.content:encoded:
Last authors: Binghai Yan, Amit Kanigel

Authors: Roni Anna Gofman, Abigail Dishi, Hyeonhu Bae, et al.

Score 8/10 B_IMPORTANT_CONDMAT

Why: Chiral CDW physics in layered transition metal dichalcogenides is highly relevant to user's CDW interest.

Tags: #CDW #chiral #layeredmaterials

Abstract: npj Quantum Materials, Published online: 05 May 2026; doi:10.1038/s41535-026-00889-1 Chiral charge density wave in 1T- and 4Hb-TaS 2 : the role of interlayer coupling

item.title: [7] Charge density wave transition of pristine and organic-intercalated 1T-VSe2 studied by infrared spectroscopy

Last authors: Hongming Weng, Nanlin Wang

Authors: Tianchen Hu, Bo-Xuan Li, Shuxiang Xu, et al.

Score 7/10 B_IMPORTANT_CONDMAT

Why: Electronic spectroscopy investigation of CDW material, relevant to user's interest in CDW dynamics.

Tags: #CDW #infraredspectroscopy #electronicstructure

Abstract: npj Quantum Materials, Published online: 05 May 2026; doi:10.1038/s41535-026-00886-4 Charge density wave transition of pristine and organic-intercalated 1 T -VSe 2 studied by infrared spectroscopy

item.title: [5] Large phonon-drag thermopower polarity reversal in Ba-doped KTaO3
item.content:encoded:
Last authors: Brandi L. Wooten, Joseph P. Heremans

Authors: Mohamed Nawwar, Samuel Poage, Tobias Schwaigert, et al.

Score 5/10 C_MAYBE

Why: Broad condensed matter interest; thermopower in doped insulators.

Tags: #KTaO3 #thermopower

Abstract: npj Quantum Materials, Published online: 28 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41535-026-00875-7 Large phonon-drag thermopower polarity reversal in Ba-doped KTaO 3

item.title: [7] Multi-Q spin-valley order in twisted WSe2
item.content:encoded:
Last authors: Nai Chao Hu, Nick Bultinck

Authors: Arthur Bril, Nai Chao Hu, Nick Bultinck

Score 7/10 B_IMPORTANT_CONDMAT

Why: Experimental study of correlated physics in twisted 2D van der Waals heterostructures.

Tags: #twisted #WSe2 #correlatedelectrons

Abstract: npj Quantum Materials, Published online: 24 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41535-026-00884-6 Multi-Q spin-valley order in twisted WSe 2
